meaning: n.城墙与外濠间之狭道,崖径
examples: This berm consisted of compacted clayey soils.
The geo membrane was anchored at 4 feet up the inside slope of the separation berm .
As I got closer, I could see it was in fact a hangar, shaped a bit like a giant crab, built into a berm.
It's too early to determine how the case of Mr. Ergen's berm will be resolved.
Residents fought for years to have the berm rebuilt and other flood mitigation efforts put in place.
